name: Implantable Cancer Tag
blurb: RFID microchip implanted near tumors reports circulating DNA markers to bedside readers.

name: Orbital Asset Registry
blurb: Satellite-readable RFID tags on spacecraft components enable real-time orbital inventory tracking.

name: Zero-Loss Expert Router
blurb: Superfluid-inspired lossless interconnects route tokens between AI expert sub-networks with zero switching waste.

name: Agentic Foundation Orchestrator
blurb: Foundation model serving as a persistent meta-agent that spawns, directs, and retires task-specific sub-agents.

name: Genomic Design Compiler
blurb: Foundation model translates phenotype goals into complete genetic engineering blueprints ready for synthesis.

name: Carbon Cage Drug Designer
blurb: Foundation model proposes fullerene cage geometries optimized to encapsulate and deliver specific drug molecules.

name: Personalized Vector Architect
blurb: Foundation model designs patient-specific gene therapy vectors from genomic sequence and clinical history.

name: Predictive Disk Lifecycle Manager
blurb: Foundation model monitors drive telemetry to predict head crashes days before they occur.

name: Plasma Confinement Tutor
blurb: Foundation model continuously adjusts magnetic coil parameters to stabilize fusion plasma in real time.

name: Clone Cohort Shepherd
blurb: Intelligent agent autonomously manages cloned livestock cohorts, optimising health, growth, and genetic diversity.

name: Metabolic Coaching Agent
blurb: Autonomous software agent interprets continuous glucose data to prescribe real-time dietary and insulin interventions.

name: Adaptive Limb Controller
blurb: Intelligent agent learns a prosthesis wearer's movement intent and recalibrates motor commands continuously.

name: Self-Improving Decision Agent
blurb: Intelligent agent retrains its own machine learning policy from accumulated interaction history without human prompts.

name: Photonic Agent Interface
blurb: Intelligent agent communicates internal state via photonic chip buses, cutting inter-agent latency to nanoseconds.

name: Autonomous Reactor Governor
blurb: Intelligent agent monitors and controls small modular reactor output, responding to grid demand in milliseconds.

name: Nanocarrier Gene Delivery
blurb: Nanoscale particles ferry therapeutic genes directly into target cell nuclei without viral vectors.

name: Nano-Structured LFP Cathode
blurb: Nanoengineered lithium iron phosphate particles triple charge rate by shortening lithium-ion diffusion paths.

name: Grid-Aware Battery Intelligence
blurb: AI dynamically schedules sodium-ion battery charge cycles to match renewable supply and grid pricing.

name: Neural Clone Recognition System
blurb: Neuromorphic chip identifies cloned animals individually by gait and biometric signatures at herd scale.

name: Distributed Clone Stewardship Network
blurb: Multi-agent system coordinates geographically dispersed cloned specimen facilities for global genetic preservation.

name: Nuclear-Solar Hybrid Grid
blurb: Baseload nuclear and perovskite solar arrays share a smart microgrid, eliminating dead-night supply gaps.

name: Modular Reactor Cascade
blurb: Clusters of small modular reactors operate as plug-in units inside legacy large nuclear plant infrastructure.

name: Geothermal Wellness Monitor
blurb: Geothermal-powered wearable sensor node provides continuous glucose monitoring in remote off-grid clinics.

name: Geothermal Prosthetic Power Cell
blurb: Ground-source thermoelectric harvester trickle-charges embedded prosthetic limb actuators indefinitely.

name: Subsurface Reservoir Intelligence
blurb: Machine learning models seismic and temperature data to forecast geothermal well output years ahead.

name: Fiber-Optic Geothermal Sensor
blurb: Photonic integrated circuits on downhole probes measure subsurface temperature profiles at kilometer depth.

name: Deep Earth SMR Hybrid
blurb: Small modular reactor supplements geothermal output when reservoir temperatures dip below generation threshold.

name: Tumor-Report Fax Protocol
blurb: Legacy fax infrastructure repurposed to relay liquid biopsy results to rural clinics without internet.

name: Satellite-Relayed Document Network
blurb: Satellite constellation provides fax-protocol fallback for disaster-zone document transmission when terrestrial lines fail.

name: Photonic Settlement Ledger
blurb: Photonic chip signs and validates cryptocurrency transactions at light speed, slashing confirmation latency.

name: Neuromorphic MRI Accelerator
blurb: Neuromorphic chip reconstructs MRI images from sparse k-space samples thirty times faster than CPUs.

name: Low-Energy Fusion Trigger Chip
blurb: Neuromorphic controller fires cold-fusion cell electrode pulses at biologically inspired irregular rhythms for efficiency.

name: Brain-Scale AGI Substrate
blurb: Neuromorphic hardware provides the energy-efficient spiking substrate for an artificial general intelligence runtime.

name: Always-On Wearable Brain
blurb: Neuromorphic processor embedded in a wristband runs continuous gesture and health inference on microwatts.

name: Spiking Automotive Perception Engine
blurb: Neuromorphic vision chip processes self-driving sensor streams at milliwatt power, surviving battery failures.

name: Orbital Biopsy Relay
blurb: Space elevator couriers liquid biopsy samples from remote equatorial clinics to orbital labs for rapid analysis.

name: Tether-and-Constellation Logistics
blurb: Space elevator paired with satellite constellation creates end-to-end supply chain from ground to deep orbit.

name: Swarm Genetic Optimizer
blurb: Multi-agent system negotiates competing genetic engineering modifications across a crop genome to avoid epistatic conflicts.

name: Maglev Maintenance Crawler
blurb: Robots levitated on track fields inspect and repair guideway surfaces without stopping passenger service.

name: Neural Maglev Dispatcher
blurb: Neural network optimises dynamic levitation gap and train headway across an entire maglev network.

name: Expert-Routed Ride Planner
blurb: Mixture-of-experts model routes passenger requests across a maglev network with weather and demand specialization.

name: Partial-Vacuum Maglev Corridor
blurb: Sealed low-pressure tube combined with magnetic levitation eliminates both wheel friction and air resistance.

name: LFP-Powered Maglev Buffer
blurb: Lithium iron phosphate packs absorb and return regenerative braking energy at each maglev station.

name: Collaborative MRI Interpretation Grid
blurb: Multi-agent system distributes MRI scan analysis across specialist radiological AI agents for concurrent second opinions.

name: Quantum Glucose Cryptosensor
blurb: Quantum computer factorises interference patterns from CGM signals to detect glucose below current detection limits.

name: Planetary Metabolic Baseline
blurb: Glucose monitor design scales to atmospheric biosensor probes setting biochemical baselines on candidate terraformed worlds.

name: Aerogel Patch Biosensor
blurb: Aerogel substrate insulates a continuous glucose sensor patch from skin temperature swings for stable readings.

name: Metabolic Carbon Footprint Tracker
blurb: CGM data combined with exhaled CO₂ capture quantifies an individual's metabolic carbon output in real time.

name: Graphene-Perovskite Tandem Cell
blurb: Graphene electrode layer replaces brittle metal contacts in perovskite cells, boosting efficiency and outdoor durability.

name: Graphene Neutron Shield
blurb: Graphene composite lining reduces neutron flux leakage from small modular reactor pressure vessels.

name: Shared Virtual World Agents
blurb: Multi-agent system populates persistent VR environments with autonomous NPCs that adapt to collective user behaviour.

name: Sodium-Powered Field Robot
blurb: Agricultural robots powered by sodium-ion packs operate safely in extreme-temperature field conditions without fire risk.

name: CRISPR Viral Vector Eliminator
blurb: CRISPR edits a patient's cells in situ as the gene therapy vector delivers payload, correcting off-targets immediately.

name: Electrosynthetic CRISPR Factory
blurb: LFP battery powers a portable electroporator that delivers CRISPR components into cells off-grid.

name: Quantum-Optimised Vactrain Schedule
blurb: Quantum computer solves vacuum-tube train routing as a combinatorial optimisation, maximising throughput globally.

name: Continuous Biometric Wristband
blurb: Wearable device fuses vein pattern, pulse wave, and skin conductance to maintain seamless passive identity verification.

name: Fullerene Liquid Biopsy Trap
blurb: Fullerene cages in blood sample cartridges selectively capture circulating tumour DNA fragments for liquid biopsy.

name: Orbital Carbon Cage Synthesis
blurb: Satellite constellation monitors fullerene reactor plumes from orbit to regulate atmospheric carbon nanoparticle release.

name: Neural Carbon Feedback Loop
blurb: EEG signals trigger direct-air-capture units, matching CO₂ removal intensity to a user's cognitive stress state.

name: Photonic Cold Fusion Probe
blurb: Photonic integrated circuit detects gamma and neutron signatures in cold fusion cells at femtowatt sensitivity.

name: Expert-Routed Prosthetic Brain
blurb: Mixture-of-experts controller dispatches prosthetic limb commands to terrain, grip, or balance specialist sub-networks.

name: Reversible Photovoltaic Computer
blurb: Perovskite cell powers a reversible computing substrate, making solar-driven calculation thermodynamically near-lossless.

name: Solar Install Language Interface
blurb: NLP interface lets homeowners configure perovskite panel arrays and grid contracts through natural conversation.

name: Distributed Solar Bidding Agents
blurb: Multi-agent system negotiates peer-to-peer energy trades between perovskite solar households in real-time electricity markets.

name: Perovskite Electroluminescent Display
blurb: Perovskite crystal layer doubles as LCD backlight by day and photovoltaic harvester when display is idle.

name: Entropy-Free Vactrain Routing
blurb: Reversible computing optimises vacuum-tube train timetables without discarding state, enabling zero-waste rescheduling.

name: Photonic Neural Accelerator
blurb: Photonic chip performs neural network matrix multiplications at light speed with sub-picojoule energy per operation.

name: Ion Teleportation Battery
blurb: Quantum-teleported sodium-ion state transfers charge between spatially separated half-cells without physical ion migration.

name: Terraforming Pathogen Screen
blurb: Liquid biopsy probes screen settler blood for novel pathogens introduced by planetary terraforming microbiomes.

name: Planetary Terraforming Sentinel
blurb: Satellite constellation tracks atmospheric chemistry shifts during active planetary terraforming from low orbit.

name: Reactor Energy Settlement Chain
blurb: Blockchain ledger records every kilowatt-hour generated by small modular reactors for transparent carbon-credit accounting.

name: Aerogel Gene Therapy Depot
blurb: Aerogel scaffold implanted subcutaneously acts as a sustained-release reservoir for gene therapy vectors.

name: Engineered Carbon-Sink Organism
blurb: Gene therapy rewires algae metabolism to sequester CO₂ at rates outpacing direct-air-capture machinery.

name: AGI Cancer Cartographer
blurb: Artificial general intelligence interprets liquid biopsy DNA fragments to map full tumour clonal evolution in real time.

name: Wearable Liquid Biopsy Patch
blurb: Skin-worn device continuously samples interstitial fluid for circulating tumour DNA without needle blood draws.

name: Mobile Oncology Lab
blurb: Self-driving vehicle carries an onboard liquid biopsy analyser to rural patients and returns results within hours.

name: AGI Society Simulation
blurb: Artificial general intelligence orchestrates millions of autonomous agents to model societal outcomes of policy decisions.

name: Federated Swarm Learning
blurb: Multi-agent system trains a shared machine learning model across devices without any agent sharing raw data.

name: Collaborative AR Workspace
blurb: Multi-agent system coordinates shared augmented reality overlays so remote teams manipulate the same digital objects together.

name: Polyglot Negotiation Swarm
blurb: Multi-agent system where NLP-specialised agents negotiate contracts across language barriers in real time.

name: Dyson Expert Energy Allocator
blurb: Mixture-of-experts controller distributes stellar energy harvested by a Dyson sphere to planetary civilisation sectors.

name: Bioprocess Expert Router
blurb: Mixture-of-experts model routes biotechnology fermentation queries to specialised enzyme, pathway, or regulatory sub-networks.

name: Distributed CT Triage Grid
blurb: Multi-agent system routes CT scans to specialist radiological AI agents by organ and urgency simultaneously.

name: Aerogel Vactrain Shell
blurb: Aerogel composite lining insulates vacuum tube walls, halving cryogenic conditioning costs for near-supersonic trains.

name: Sodium Grid Balancing Swarm
blurb: Multi-agent system coordinates thousands of sodium-ion battery nodes to stabilise grid frequency in real time.

name: Electrochromic Sodium Display

name: Orbital Cold Storage Array
blurb: Satellite constellation relays data to hard disk archives in low-orbit cold-environment vaults for long-term retention.

name: Holographic Health Mirror

name: Live Translation Earpiece

name: Holographic CO₂ Visualiser
blurb: Holographic display reconstructs real-time atmospheric CO₂ concentration fields captured by direct-air-capture sensor networks.

name: Vehicular Swarm Navigator

name: Satellite Power Pack Standard
